title: Harar Jugol Heritage Restoration
description: UNESCO supports restoration of Harar’s ancient walls and gates.

title: Lalibela Rock-Hewn Churches Preservation
description: Efforts underway to protect Lalibela’s iconic monolithic churches from erosion.

title: Gondar Castle Renovation
description: Royal Enclosure in Gondar receives new conservation funding.

description: Archaeologists highlight Axum’s ancient obelisks as symbols of Ethiopian heritage.

description: Colorful sulfur springs and lava lakes attract global attention.

title: Simien Mountains Trekking
description: Tourists flock to rugged cliffs and Gelada baboons in Simien Mountains.

title: Omo Valley Cultural Festival
description: Celebrating Ethiopia’s diverse tribal heritage with traditional attire and ceremonies.
